'''Dezsetes''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]], who was serving aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Mathayus]]'' in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], initially as [[Second officer/Legends|Second Officer]] with the rank of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Coy]] and [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Atali]].

==Biography==
Dezsetes was part of a [[Anti-Sith conspiracy|coup]] led by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Trachta]], aiming to overthrow [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and replace them with an oligarchy of senior military and paramilitary commanders. As the plot took shape, Dezsetes was promoted to second-in-command after the elimination of Officer Altai, and seized opportunities to display his capabilities to Vader, who was then using the ''Mathayus'' as his base of operations. When Dezsetes decided that Admiral Coy could not be counted on to join the coup, he murdered him in his quarters, and hiding the true nature of this incident, he seems to have been raised to Admiral by Vader in its aftermath.

[[File:DezsetesDeath.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The death of "Admiral" Dezsetes]]

With a cadre of Trachta's specially-conditioned stormtroopers, Dezsetes finally confronted Vader, only to see his vaunted troops utterly defeated and destroyed. Beaten and cornered, Dezsetes defiantly claimed that Palpatine had been killed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by Trachta, prompting Vader to execute him. These events, relayed by [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] to the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]], also led to the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kadir (Moff)|Kadir]], who had seized the leadership of the coup, and was at that moment attempting to persuade Palpatine of his continuing usefulness after its failure.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 1|''Empire'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Empire 4|''Empire'' 4]]
